summary: The story revolves around a character who is on their first round of a challenge, but feels inadequate and unsure if they can harness the power of a mysterious seal. They recall that demons are cast out when they lose power, and believe they must become more powerful to succeed. As they struggle, they suddenly remember how to use the seal's power and discover the real name of an entity, which gives them a surge of energy.
key_moments: The protagonist remembers their past as demons being cast out when they lose power
They feel inadequate and unsure if they can harness the power of the mysterious seal
They suddenly remember how to use the seal's power and discover the real name of an entity
